EmailTemplate.description: After an Ahpra check has been made, notify owner is a review is required.
EmailTemplate.name: Ahpra Comliance Review Required
EmailTemplate.subject: Ahpra Candidate Review Required - {!Contact.FirstName} {!Contact.LastName}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
An Ahpra check has been performed on candidate {!Contact.FirstName} {!Contact.LastName} and one or more compliance elements need a review.
Please review the associated Ahpra record {!Ahpra_Candidate_Check__c.Name}. Thanks The Alliance Team.
